definition: Ability to maintain minimum essential service during disruption
measurement_note: Measure by service availability service quality duration and critical-user access

definition: Backup pathways reserve capacity alternate routes spare parts and distributed capability
measurement_note: Assess common-mode vulnerabilities and whether backups depend on the same fragile inputs

definition: Ability to restore minimum and full service after disruption
measurement_note: Measure restoration time repair capacity crews procurement mutual aid and access

definition: Ability to revise design operations standards and investments as conditions change
measurement_note: Assess monitoring learning flexible design scenario planning and decision triggers

definition: Protection for vulnerable users places and critical public services during outage and recovery
measurement_note: Use disaggregated outage duration restoration priority affordability access and participation data

definition: Risk that disruption propagates across interdependent infrastructure systems
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger dependency mapping cascade stress tests and cross-sector coordination
